label: Developer Experience
summary: A terminal-first developer layer for OpenRoot OS: static API metadata, JSON contracts, plugin registry, extension map, CLI command guide, import/export contracts, test gates and documentation signals.

endpoints.purpose: Static health snapshot for uptime checks and release verification.
Full public knowledge snapshot generated from content/knowledge.
Developer-facing contract with commands, plugins, extensions and release gates.

api.contract: No backend is required. Consumers should treat the API as immutable static JSON until the next release artifact is deployed.

rules: Every knowledge file must be valid JSON.
Public snapshots are generated during build before Vite emits dist.
Release metadata must stay synchronized across package.json, health.json and docs.

pluginSystem.runtime: createOpenRoot registers plugins before shell boot.

extensions.name: Command extension
extensions.example: Add an OpenRootPlugin command and register it in main.ts.

extensions.name: Content extension
extensions.example: Add JSON under content/knowledge and mount it in src/content.ts.

extensions.name: Theme extension
extensions.example: Register a theme through the theme registry.
